lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: C'mon, why won't this thing open?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like me to give you a hand with that?

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: It's okay, I think I've got it... Agh, I thought I had it that time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you searching this coffin?

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: I need to bring that mysterious stranger 100 Hallowed marks so that he can help me escape Darkmeyer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 100 seems like a lot. How many do you have so far?

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: None.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have 100 either.

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: That's okay. I'm sure I'll get this open eventually.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I happen to have 100 Hallowed marks on me. I can give you some if you'd like?

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: Wow! You'd do that for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I think I'll keep them for myself.

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: Oh... You didn't have to tease me like that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. I'll probably find more while I'm down here anyway.

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: I can't thank you enough! I can finally buy my freedom!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're welcome!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It feels nice to do the right thing.

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: C'mon, why won't this thing open?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, why are you still here? I gave you the 100 Hallowed marks you need to escape.

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: I think you have me mistaken for someone else.

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: Now go away. I can't hear the locking mechanism with you breathing in my ear!

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: C'mon, almost got it...

lines.speaker: Darkmeyer Slave
lines.text: Agh, thought I had it that time!
